content: I worked on the ERP system. I saw Karan Verma logging in at 2 AM from his home IP. I saw him accessing the Adobe Sign module and generating signatures for clients I knew had never signed anything. I asked him why. He said, ‘It’s Arjun’s order. Don’t ask.’ I saw 12 fake signatures being applied to service reports for clients who never existed. I told Rajiv. He said, ‘It’s policy now.’ I went to HR. Sunita told me, ‘You’re overreacting.’ I was terminated two days later. I didn’t resign. I have screenshots of Karan’s login history and the signature timestamps. I never signed an NDA. They gave me ₹5 lakh cash in an envelope and said, ‘Take it and disappear.’
